description: Retrieve the current onboarding session state for a given session identifier.
List addresses captured while the user is still in the onboarding session flow.
Add a new address record associated with the onboarding session before party finalization.
Update an existing onboarding-session address (partial update).
Create or replace the applicant profile details collected during onboarding.
Submit or update the applicant email address as part of contact verification during onboarding.
Request a new email verification code or retry the email verification step.
Submit or update the applicant phone number for SMS or call verification during onboarding.
Request a new phone verification code or retry the phone verification step.
Resolve and return the party record linked to the onboarding session, if one exists. After approval, partners may also receive the same payload via the party.ready outbound webhook.
List outstanding onboarding requirements or checklist items the applicant must satisfy.
Submit the completed onboarding package for internal review or underwriting handoff.
Register or update the HTTPS URL (and optional signing secret) where Rhino POSTs a party.ready event when internal onboarding is approved with a party_id.
Fetch a party profile and core attributes for a known party identifier.
List all addresses on file for the party after onboarding has produced a party record.
Add a new address to the party’s permanent address book post-onboarding.
Update an existing party address (partial update).
Create a new loan application for the authenticated or implied borrower context.
Retrieve the full loan application record including status and key fields.
Update editable fields on a draft or in-progress loan application.
Submit a loan application for credit decisioning or operations review.
List all loan applications associated with a given party.
List loan products this party is eligible to apply for, typically filtered by rules or catalog.
List loans booked or visible to the party (borrower-facing loan portfolio view).
Return details for a single loan that belongs to the party.
List historical or periodic loan balance snapshots for the loan.
Return the most recent outstanding balance and related figures for the loan.
List collateral items securing the loan as exposed to the borrower portal.
List saved payment methods the borrower may use for this loan.
Tokenize or register a new payment method for repayments on this loan.
Update metadata or default flags on an existing borrower payment method.
Initiate a borrower payment (intent or charge) against the loan balance.
Return the amortization or repayment schedule installments for the loan.
List payments, fees, and other ledger transactions visible to the borrower for this loan.
List borrower-visible communications tied to collections or servicing for this loan.
Summarize delinquency status or cases associated with the loan for borrower visibility.
List documents linked to an onboarding session before or after party creation.
Register metadata for a document uploaded or linked during onboarding (for example type and storage reference).
List documents (statements, notices, disclosures) available for this loan in the portal.
